---
name: Question
about: Ask a question about the project
title: '[QUESTION] '
labels: ['question']
assignees: ''
---

## ❓ Question

**What would you like to know?**
Please describe your question clearly and provide context.

## 🔍 What I've Already Tried

Please describe what you've already researched or attempted:

- [ ] Searched existing issues
- [ ] Read the documentation
- [ ] Checked the README.md
- [ ] Reviewed the code
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📚 Context

Please provide any relevant context that might help us answer your question:

- What are you trying to accomplish?
- What part of the system/feature are you working with?
- Any relevant code snippets or configurations?

## 🎯 Expected Information

What kind of answer or information would be most helpful to you?

## 📋 Additional Details

Any other details that might be relevant to your question.
